subprograms.name: alloc
subprograms.code:
function alloc
  (T : access constant gsl_rng_type)
   return access gsl_rng

subprograms.name: clone
subprograms.code:
function clone
  (r : access constant gsl_rng)
   return access gsl_rng

subprograms.name: env_setup

function env_setup
   return access constant gsl_rng_type

subprograms.name: fread
subprograms.code:
function fread
  (stream : access ICS.FILEs;

   return int

subprograms.name: fwrite
subprograms.code:
function fwrite
  (stream : access ICS.FILEs;
   r      : access constant gsl_rng)
   return int

   return unsigned_long

function min
  (r : access constant gsl_rng)
